name: Nanosonics Limited
description: Nanosonics Limited is an Australian-based healthcare company specializing in the development and commercialization of infection prevention solutions. The company is best known for its innovative trophon® technology, an automated high-level disinfection system for ultrasound probes that utilizes hydrogen peroxide mist to ensure patient safety. With a global presence, Nanosonics focuses on improving clinical outcomes by providing advanced, sustainable, and audit-ready reprocessing technologies. The company continues to expand its portfolio, including the development of the CORIS® system for endoscope reprocessing, reinforcing its commitment to setting new standards in infection control and patient care.
